response.global_summary: A cooking stream video featuring two VTubers discussing the process of making waterless spice curry. Throughout the segment, the VTubers are talking about the cooking method, checking the progress of the food in the pot, and discussing the necessary spice ingredients. There is no vocal music playing in the background.

scenes.description: The cooking stream begins with the VTubers discussing the initial steps and process of making waterless spice curry. They are talking to each other while the curry is simmering.
The speaker opens the lid of the pot to stir the cooking ingredients, checking on the state of the curry, and observing the steam and texture of the food.
The discussion shifts to the spices being used. The speaker points out specific spice brands like S&B, and they talk about the recipe's spice requirements.
